What SaferCiti Does

Built for How
Nigeria Really Moves

Every feature designed around real Nigerian security challenges — from interstate travel to urban proximity alerts.

📡
Live Incident Feed
Real-time reports of communal violence, banditry, terrorism, and accidents — verified through 39+ news sources and community reports.
LIVE · NOW
🗺️
Smart Route Safety
Plan any journey with LGA-level risk scoring, first/last-mile alerts, and side-by-side route comparisons before you drive.
BFS ALGORITHM
🚨
One-Tap SOS
Instantly alert trusted contacts with your live location. Works in low connectivity. No fumbling in an emergency.
EMERGENCY
🔍
Missing Persons Registry
Active cases tracked with media auto-detection from Daily Trust, Vanguard, and 37+ other sources. Community tip-line included.
AUTO-DETECTED
⛽
Travel Hub
Live fuel station availability, road condition reports, and community travel reviews — everything for interstate journeys.
LIVE DATA
